final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Xiaohongshu cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform, in the editorial restraint of a premium fashion magazine.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu cover design with the crisp typographic confidence of high-end fashion editorial, designed for the scroll-stopping moment
Composition: diagonal composition, visual energy flowing from bottom-left to top-right, text and graphic elements anchored along the diagonal axis
Subject: product announcement cover featuring "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as hero typography
Scene/backdrop: generous negative space allowing the diagonal tension to breathe, subtle gradient or texture field supporting the typographic statement
Lighting/mood: the sharp clarity of magazine-grade production, confident and aspirational
Color palette: high-contrast statement with one bold accent color cutting through a restrained neutral ground, the chromatic confidence of editorial luxury
Materials/textures: matte paper finish with the subtle tooth of premium stock, typography crisp as letterpress
Text (verbatim): GPT-image-2, Lovart
Constraints: diagonal flow must be immediately readable, both brand names prominent and legible at thumbnail scale, Xiaohongshu 3:4 vertical format
Avoid: decorative clutter, soft pastel palettes, centered static composition, generic tech-launch aesthetics
